title: The state of homelab tech (2024)
description: Techno Tim explores 2024 homelab trends including network speed upgrades, power efficiency, CPU capabilities for transcoding, ZFS and TrueNAS storage solutions, UniFi vs. pfSense networking, home automation, and cameras.
